nasb.text: For thus says the Lord God of Israel concerning the houses of this city, and concerning the houses of the kings of Judah which are broken down to make a defense against the siege ramps and against the sword,

esv.text: For thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, concerning the houses of this city and the houses of the kings of Judah that were torn down to make a defense against the siege mounds and against the sword:

cnv.text: 論到這城裡的房屋和猶大王的宮殿，就是為了抵擋敵人的攻城土壘和刀劍而拆毀的，耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝耶和华说，耶路撒冷城中的房屋和王宫被拆毁，用来修建防卫工事，
